title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Doubtnut Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Doubtnut Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Doubtnut Advisory Limited family as a Teacher in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Doubtnut Advisory Limited:
Doubtnut Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut Advisory Limited!
